package rulefixtures

import (
	"time"
)

// scenario for time_until_candidate_via_deadline_sub_now: `deadline.Sub(time.Now())` instead of `time.Until(deadline)`.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario687Positive(items []string) int {
	total := 0
	for _, item := range items {
		_ = time.Now()
		_ = time.After(time.Millisecond)
		total += len(item)
	}
	return total
}
